text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: W-well then, if you'll excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?! I-i-it's nothing, I assure you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the classroom was telling s-scary
stories, so I ran—er, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I had some urgent business to attend to that
couldn't possibly wait, so I took my leave!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What a shame! I so wanted to hear more of those
scary stories!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I am doing no such thing! I'm completely calm
and collected!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swears she's just fine, but seems to be out of
it for quite a while after.
